situation: audit-2026-07-07-029 finding MONI-PY-001 (H): /llm/chat accepts user-controlled provider_override.base_url without validation, enabling SSRF — attacker can point base_url at internal hosts (e.g. http://169.254.169.254/, http://localhost:PORT/) and the proxy will send the configured api_key in Authorization header to that target, leaking credentials and enabling internal service probing.
action: Added _ALLOWED_LLM_HOSTS frozenset whitelist (api.deepseek.com, api.openai.com, api.anthropic.com, dashscope.aliyuncs.com, generativelanguage.googleapis.com, openrouter.ai) and _validate_llm_base_url() helper enforcing https-only + host-in-whitelist. Wired validation into /llm/chat when provider_override.base_url present, and into POST /llm/config to prevent persisting malicious base_url. Used case-104 escape hatch: cp modified api.py into existing opt-local_simulator-1783352870 worktree (already holds case-083 MONI-PY-005 fix), committed directly in wt, pushed.
outcome_evidence: commit 8fd3bbd on auto/opt-local_simulator-1783352870 pushed to origin (git push output: '1f030f4..8fd3bbd'); python3 ast.parse syntax check passed; diff shows 56 insertions / 35 deletions in local_simulator/api.py adding allowlist + two validation call sites
next_suggestion: 派生 MONI-PY-002 (M, unbounded backtest frames memory exhaustion DoS via /backtest/run api.py:127)
派生 MONI-PY-003 (M, synchronous blocking WFO on async event loop /validation/grid-search api.py:1737)
派生 MONI-PY-004 (M, agent action whitelist bypass — 8 actions pass arbitrary kwargs api.py:1375)

audit_findings.finding: SSRF via /llm/chat provider_override.base_url — user input forwarded to urllib.request.urlopen with api_key in Authorization header without URL/host validation
audit_findings.remediation: Add _ALLOWED_LLM_HOSTS whitelist + _validate_llm_base_url() enforcing https scheme + hostname membership; validate both provider_override path and POST /llm/config persistence path
